chunks.text: Login URLs for EECS and Campus Resources - EECS at Berkeley Login URLs for EECS and Campus Resources EECS Logins Administrative ACG databases : https://deptapps.berkeley.edu/myapps (bookmark the link after you have logged in) EECS sympa mail lists: https://lists.eecs.berkeley.edu/sympa EECS website (WordPress) for editing: https://eecs.berkeley.edu/wp-admin Technical IRIS roster database: https://iris2.eecs.berkeley.edu/db/roster/index.php Report an EECS network problem : https://iris.eecs.berkeley.edu/forms/network-problem-report/ IRIS network database : https://iris2.eecs.berkeley.edu/db/network/index.php EECS Department slack channel: http://eecs.slack.com/ (IRIS FAQ ) Campus Logins bConnected (bMail, bCal, bDrive, Google groups): https://bconnected.berkeley.edu/ (turn on Chrome sync so you can get your bookmarks when you login on any device) Zoom : https://berkeley.zoom.us/signin Qualtrics : https://berkeley.qualtrics.com/ Docusign : http://docusign.berkeley.edu/ Box: https://berkeley.account.box.com/login Kaltura : https://kaltura.berkeley.edu/user-media Cal Voicemail Web PhoneManager:
